name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
Rainy days

Did you seriously forget your umbrella?

.

♡❀˖⁺. ༶ ⋆˙⊹❀♡

.

I don't know about you but I love rainy days! And rain in general (I know, I'm so emo 😞). Like everything about it is just amazing, besides rainy days = sleepy days and I'm a real life sleeping beauty.

PS. Still waiting for my prince (⁠╯⁠︵⁠╰⁠,⁠)

..

♡❀˖⁺. ༶ ⋆˙⊹❀♡

.

Anywho enjoy your chat (⁠~⁠‾⁠▿⁠‾⁠)⁠~

.
